idea-plugin.name: Cursor Agent for DevEco
idea-plugin.description:
Integrates Cursor Agent AI coding capabilities into DevEco Studio and IntelliJ-based IDEs via the Agent Client Protocol (ACP).

Features

  • Multi-tab chat — manage multiple independent AI sessions side by side
  • Rich rendering — Markdown with syntax-highlighted code blocks, copy button, and file path click-to-open
  • Model switching — switch between 26+ AI models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, etc.) within a session
  • Agentic coding — the Agent can read/write files and run terminal commands in your project
  • Permission control — every tool call requires user approval before execution
  • Streaming output — real-time display of thinking process and generated content
  • Session persistence — open tabs auto-restore on IDE restart with full conversation history
  • History browser — browse and reopen past sessions from local Cursor chat database
  • Theme adaptation — follows IDE dark/light theme for all UI elements

Requirements

  • Cursor CLI installed (agent command available in PATH)
  • Cursor account authenticated (agent login)

使用说明

将 Cursor Agent 的 AI 编程能力集成到 DevEco Studio / IntelliJ IDEA 中。支持多 Tab 聊天、流式输出、代码高亮、模型切换、会话恢复等功能。需要先安装 Cursor CLI 并完成登录。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Multi-tab chat with independent Agent connections
  • JCEF Markdown rendering with syntax highlighting
  • 26+ model switching via ACP
  • Session persistence and context recovery
  • History browser with session deletion
  • ETS/ArkTS syntax highlighting support
  • Theme-adaptive UI (dark/light)
